attacks.scenario: 惡意 RIPGREP_CONFIG_PATH/env 或把 query 當 flag 注入 rg
attacks.failSafeTest: 白名單最小 env(剔 RIPGREP_*)+-e/-- 隔離 query；真 rg 驗 config 未生效、--foo 當字面

attacks.scenario: 取代經 workspace 內 junction 寫到外部機密檔；lost-update 覆蓋
attacks.failSafeTest: resolveSafe skip outside + writeFileSafe conflict；真 fs 驗外部檔 byte 不變

attacks.scenario: 取代破壞 Big5/CRLF 編碼或誤改二進位檔
attacks.failSafeTest: 保留編碼/EOL byte-identical、二進位 skip

attacks.scenario: 連續搜尋殘留 rg 程序洩漏/cancel 後仍 emit
attacks.failSafeTest: 注入 fake spawn：存活 child≤1、cancel 後不再 emit、Map 清空

attacks.scenario: 超長無換行行/壞 rgPath 卡 UI/記憶體爆
attacks.failSafeTest: maxLineBytes 丟棄、ENOENT 仍 done、0 命中 done 非錯
